title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank Phone Banking has been designed and formulated keeping in mind all our esteemed customers. Customers can use the self-service option to save time or take the assistance of a phone banker. Following self-service options can be accessed in 12 languages through the BANKING ACCOUNTS menu with Customer ID + TPIN or Debit Card Number + ATM PIN authentication: 
  * Information on Balance of all accounts in the Customer ID and last 5 Transactions.
  * Request cheque book, stop cheque and get information on status of Cheques Issued or Deposited. 
  * Request for Statement by E-mail: you can give as many requests for statement on email for any 3 months using the self-service option in Phone Banking free of charge. 
  * Email ID updation request you can call us from your registered mobile number and self authenticate to update email id in your account.
  * Unblocking of debit card for online payments call us from your Registered Mobile Number and self authenticate on IVR to place a request for unblocking your debit card. 
  * PAN updation call us from regd. Mobile number & authenticate with TPIN/ATM PIN)
  * Aadhaar verification with bank account(s): You can carry out instant OTP based Aadhaar authentication as well as link Aadhaar to your savings bank account on IVR.


Retail Individual account holders can generate their ATM PIN instantly anytime, anywhere through IVR, free of charge if their mobile number is registered in the account for receiving OTP. 
  * Hotlisting of debit card and other digital channels viz. UPI, Inet & Mobile banking
  * Request for replacement debit card in case of loss/theft/misplacement (call from RMN is mandatory) 
  * Information / Issues on usage of - ATM, Internet Banking or Mobile Banking, branch locations & contact numbers, etc.


Customers having a ‘loan only’ relationship with us can generate their TPIN with their customer id and following the IVR to generate a code of their choice by pressing 4 in the main menu of phone banking which pertains to “Loans”.
